lesson.menu_desc: Who Is Vanessa? — Present Simple & Self-Introduction — 30 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 1 — Diagnostic Session and Personal Introduction — Who Is Vanessa?
lesson.title_tag: Professor View — Vanessa Giuriati | Aula 1 — Diagnostic + Personal Introduction

listenings.text: Hi Vanessa, this is your teacher, Daniel. Welcome to your first class. I just want to say one thing before we start. You do not need to be perfect today. You do not need to know every word. My only job today is to listen to you and to learn who you are. So please relax. Speak slowly. Take your time. If you forget a word, that is completely fine. We will build everything together, step by step. I am really happy to start this journey with you. See you in class.

Let me tell you about a normal day for me. I usually wake up early, around six thirty. I make a cup of coffee, and I check my phone for a few minutes. Then I start my work. I am quite organized, so I like to plan my day before I begin. In the afternoon, I have lunch with my family or with a friend. In the evening, I relax. I read a little, or I watch a series. I do not go to bed late. I feel calm when my day has a clear structure. That is who I am.

extra_audio.text: First, say hello and give your name. Second, say where you are from. Third, say what you do every day. Fourth, say one thing you like. Fifth, say your goal with English.
